messages.content: 请翻译成英语：本文提出了一种无监督的候选生成方法用于改善PRVR，但实验未证明该方法的有效性
This article proposed an unsupervised candidate generation method for improving PRVR, but experiments did not demonstrate the effectiveness of the method.

please summarize the following: Video retrieval by text has been extensively studied in the academic community. However, most retrieval datasets trim the videos to a short duration and completely align them with the corresponding text queries. In reality, however, there is a significant difference, as the target content may only be a small part of the untrimmed video. This means that the query and the video are only partially relevant, and the relevant part of the video is unknown and expensive to annotate. Thus partially relevant video retrieval is more challenging than fully aligned video retrieval. Most existing methods for text-to-video retrieval (T2VR) or video corpus moment retrieval
(VCMR) ignored this problem, resulting in suboptimal performance if directly applied to the PRVR task. In this paper, we propose to enhance partially relevant retrieval performance through a locate-then-retrieve pattern. By identifying the most relevant moment in the video given the query, the text and video segment can be more finely and accurately aligned. Specifically,we design a Gaussianproposal generator and introduce contrastive learning to retrieve the most relevant proposals without temporal annotation and utilize a multi-level proposal-based similarity learning module to jointly learn the proposal-level and video-level similarities. Furthermore,
we focus on exploiting the consistency and complementarity of video and subtitles to improve performance through cross-modal interaction. Our proposed network can be in an end-to-end manner. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the both TVR and ActivityNet Captions datasets, surpassing previous methods by approximately 33% in terms of R@1 on the TVR dataset.

This article discusses the challenges of partially relevant video retrieval (PRVR) and proposes a "locate-then-retrieve" pattern to enhance retrieval performance. The proposed method involves identifying the most relevant moment in a video given the query and using a Gaussian proposal generator and contrastive learning to retrieve the most relevant proposals without temporal annotation. The method also utilizes a multi-level proposal-based similarity learning module and cross-modal interaction to improve performance. The proposed network achieves state-of-the-art performance on TVR and ActivityNet Captions datasets.
请翻译成英文：文章的立意比较新颖，但实验不足以支撑论文的主要创新。实验性能的增益是源于更优的编码器结构，还是源于候选生成模块需要明确说明。

The idea of the paper is somewhat novel, but the experiments are insufficient to support the primary innovation of the paper. It is unclear whether the improvement in experimental performance is due to a superior encoder structure or the candidacy generation module needs to be clearly explained.
请翻译成英文：文章提出的候选生成模块很具有吸引力，且性能改善明显
The proposed candidacy generation module in the paper is very attractive, and the performance improvement is significant.
请翻译成英文：消融实验部分的实验设置需要明确
The experimental setting in the ablation study section needs to be clarified.
请翻译成英文：文章提出的主要模块的泛化性需要进一步证明，如在更多现有模型上是否能进一步显著提高性能
The generalization of the main module proposed in the paper needs to be further demonstrated, such as whether it can significantly improve performance on more existing models.
请翻译成英文：总的训练损失中为什么没有A?
Why is there no A in the overall training loss?
请翻译成英文：A和B的有效性并未单独得到验证
The effectiveness of A and B has not been separately validated.
